headline: CCJ oversold. CCJ and NXT cooling below MA50. Entry window open.
marketContext: Cycle is in Expansion / risk-on (confidence 87%) — posture is watch_only. Fundamentals are running ahead of price in Gold & Silver — Correction Within a Structural Bull and AI Infrastructure Hardware — Rate Compression, Not Demand Break — the market's fear is the opportunity. Fed Hike Repricing — The Q3 Macro Axis, NAVN — Profitability Inflection, Parabolic Price is priced ahead of fundamentals — don't chase.
groupAContext: BWXT (RSI 43.4, -22.1% from peak), CLS (RSI 47.6, -24.7% from peak), APP (RSI 51.5, -30.5% from peak) are cooling — early-entry thesis intact. KNSL is extended (RSI 59.5) — no new entry here, let momentum resolve. Best setup: BWXT at RSI 43.4 — -22.1% from 52-week high with narrative not yet priced by institutions.
groupBContext: CCJ (RSI 38.5) is technically oversold — historically a high-quality entry signal for moat names. NXT (RSI 43.9, -11% vs MA50), GOOGL (RSI 47, -4% vs MA50), PLTR (RSI 49.9, -4% vs MA50) are below MA50 with cooling RSI — approaching entry range. Highest conviction: NVDA (score 75) — use RSI and MA50 levels to time entry, not to validate the thesis.
